name: Astral Express Girls
description:
Image source: Idk what to put for this one, chat. It's kinda me, cuz I made the image, but I didn't make any of the components of the image, so it's also not me. Whatever.

Himeko, Stelle and March from Honkai Star Rail. This took a while, but thanks to the HSR wiki for a lot of the info and to @samiosugibaby for making the bot that inspired this one. I honestly don't know if excessive token counts cause issues, but if possible, I may add more characters in the future. Also, I added lore stuff for the folks who care about that. Have fun! (P.S. I spent far too much time cutting Himeko out of her splash art for the avatar.) (Disclaimer: Bubbles not included.)

8/17/25: I hate that this is my most popular bot 😭 The thumbnail is so unserious. I promise that I'll remake this bot eventually.
creator: Antithesis
